description: Reference harness config. Model/provider come from the environment (LLM_MODEL / LLM_BASE_URL / LLM_API_FORMAT); this file only sets per-role token budgets and reasoning effort, so the same config works against any provider.

llm._lever: maxTokens is the PRIMARY cost lever and is always active. reasoningEffort is a SECONDARY lever that only takes effect on the Responses API when LLM_REASONING is enabled and LLM_MODEL is a reasoning model (see hooks/unified/modules/llm-call.mjs).

summarize.description: Per-compaction session summary. Runs on EVERY compaction (high frequency) → cheap, small budget. The token-economy 'spend little, often' role.

recall.description: On-demand deep analysis (/evolve, /retrospective). Runs RARELY (low frequency) but matters more → afford a bigger budget (and more effort, on a reasoning model). The 'spend more, seldom' role.

formatting.comment: Formatters run on PostToolUse for Write|Edit. Uses npx for JS/TS so no global install is needed. Missing formatters are a no-op (fail-silent).

onStop.comment: Run only when matching files changed this session; never throws. null = no gate for that stack.
